mapper.insert: insert into orders (order_no, user_id, total_amount, final_amount, shipping_address, receiver_name, receiver_phone) values (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{finalAmount}, #{shippingAddress}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone})

insert into order_items (order_id, flower_id, flower_name, flower_image, unit_price, quantity, subtotal, shop_id, shop_status) values (#{orderId}, #{submit.flowerId}, #{submit.flowerName}, #{submit.flowerImage}, #{submit.unitPrice}, #{submit.quantity}, #{submit.subtotal}, #{submit.shopId}, 0)
mapper.select: select * from orders where user_id = #{userId} and order_status = 0
select * from orders where user_id = #{userId} and order_status = 0
mapper.update:
update orders
total_amount = #{orders.totalAmount},
shipping_fee = #{orders.shippingFee},
final_amount = #{orders.finalAmount},
payment_method = #{orders.paymentMethod},
shipping_address = #{orders.shippingAddress},
receiver_name = #{orders.receiverName},
receiver_phone = #{orders.receiverPhone},
order_notes = #{orders.orderNotes},
payment_status = #{orders.paymentStatus},
order_status = #{orders.orderStatus},
updated_at = #{orders.updatedAt}
where order_id = #{orders.orderId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select o.order_id , o.order_no , o.total_amount , o.shipping_fee , o.final_amount , o.payment_method , o.payment_status , o.order_status , o.shipping_address , o.receiver_name , o.receiver_phone , o.order_notes , o.paid_time , o.shipped_time , o.completed_time , o.cancelled_time , o.created_at , o.updated_at , o.cancellation_reason , o.rejection_reason from orders o where user_id = #{userId} order by o.created_at desc
mapper.update:
update orders
payment_method = #{paymentMethod},
payment_status = #{paymentStatus},
order_status = #{orderStatus},
paid_time = #{paidTime},
updated_at = #{updatedAt}
where order_id = #{orderId} and user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE orders
total_amount = #{totalAmount},
shipping_fee = #{shippingFee},
final_amount = #{finalAmount},
payment_method = #{paymentMethod},
payment_status = #{paymentStatus},
order_status = #{orderStatus},
shipping_address = #{shippingAddress},
receiver_name = #{receiverName},
receiver_phone = #{receiverPhone},
order_notes = #{orderNotes},
paid_time = #{paidTime},
shipped_time = #{shippedTime},
completed_time = #{completedTime},
cancelled_time = #{cancelledTime},
created_at = #{createdAt},
updated_at = NOW(),
rejection_reason = #{rejectionReason},
cancellation_reason = #{cancellationReason}
WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT o.order_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS count FROM orders o INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.shop_id = #{shopId} GROUP BY o.order_status

select o.order_item_id, o.order_id, o.flower_id, o.flower_name, o.flower_image, o.unit_price, o.quantity, o.subtotal, o.created_at, o.shop_id, o.shop_status, o.shop_updated_at, s.shop_name from order_items o LEFT JOIN shops s ON o.shop_id = s.shop_id where order_id = #{orderId}

select o.order_item_id, o.order_id, o.flower_id, o.flower_name, o.flower_image, o.unit_price, o.quantity, o.subtotal, o.created_at, o.shop_id, o.shop_status, o.shop_updated_at, s.shop_name from order_items o LEFT JOIN shops s ON o.shop_id = s.shop_id where o.order_id = #{orderId} and o.shop_id = #{shopId}
mapper.insert: insert into reviews (user_id, order_id, flower_id, rating, content) values (#{userId}, #{orderReviewDTO.orderId}, #{orderReviewDTO.flowerId}, #{orderReviewDTO.rating}, #{orderReviewDTO.content})
